name: pax6a_pax6b_chr25_chr7
description: Zebrafish TGD ohnolog pair: pax6a/pax6b — eye/CNS master regulator; both retained with strict spatial subfunctionalisation. These developmental regulators are retained in pairs after the teleost-specific whole-genome duplication because their dosage and tissue-specific expression are under strong selection (Force-Lynch DDC model, Lynch-Conery escape from adaptive conflict). CDS identity 80-92%, UTR identity often <50%.
